Instance Property# defaultUnit

iOS 17.0+iPadOS 17.0+Mac CatalystmacOS 14.0+tvOS 17.0+visionOSwatchOS 10.0+

```
final var defaultUnit: IntentParameter<Value>.ElectricCharge? { get }
```

Available when `Value` conforms to `_IntentValue`, `Value` conforms to `Sendable`, and `Value.ValueType` is `Measurement<UnitElectricCharge>`.## [See Also](/documentation/appintents/intentparameter/defaultunit-1cdc2#see-also)
